title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data for robots; Vera, a CPU layer for AI agents; and the Isaac GR00T humanoid reference robot. Together these form an integrated physical AI stack enabling robots to perceive, plan, and act in the real world.
